name: Chilled Chicken with Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: 8 Boneless Chicken Breast halves (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the chicken breasts.
2. Place each piece between two sheets of waxed paper; flatten to 1/4 inch thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
3. Place the flattened chicken pieces in a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Pour the remaining marinade ingredients over the chicken.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade, discarding it.
6. Coat a grill with cooking spray.
7. Grill the chicken for 6 inches (8 minutes), turning once.
8. Arrange the grilled chicken on a serving platter; garnish with lime wedges.
9. Serve warm or chilled with 1 1/2 tablespoons Dill Sauce per serving.
DILL SAUCE:
Combine all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth. Cover and chill thoroughly. Yield: 1 cup.
Per Serving: 27.5 g fat, 160 calories, 3.3 g carbohydrates, 72 g cholesterol, 236 mg sodium, 264 mg potassium.
